section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports complete numbness of the entire foot.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom rather than an objective exam or test result; it would more cleanly belong in the HPI, though its presence in Findings is not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: Do you have any questions or concerns before we proceed with the nursing paperwork and scheduling?
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is conversational/consent language rather than a clinical plan element; it does not mislead but is organizationally out of place in the Plan section.
